list.txt: - Host was very welcoming! Everything was perfect!! Highly recommend. Perfect spot, close to everything.

- This was a very central location and we were very comfortable as a family of four. Many good places to eat and shop nearby. We walked every where. It was also very nice to have the office at the building, very helpful staff at arrival.

- This apartment was exactly as pictured — and when they say “amazing skyline,” they truly mean it. The direct view of the Sagrada Família was absolutely incredible. Everything was very clean and well maintained. The location was also perfect, with easy access to many major sights, restaurants, and transportation.We also had a miscommunication on our end prior to the stay, and the hosts were extremely understanding and accommodating, which we really appreciated. Their kindness and responsiveness made the experience even better. We would definitely stay here again!

- Overall we enjoyed staying at this property. Our family go to Barcelona every spring and tried a new neighbourhood this year. Location was good for a 15min walk to Sagrada Família and Plaze de Cataluña. Plenty of shops nearby. The apartment was quiet and had most everything we needed.

- The apartment was clean, functional and comfortable. It was close to many restaurants snd amenities. The only difficulty was that the apartment door was a little tricky getting into. We enjoyed our stay in Barcelona.
- Great stay, excellent location. Highly recommend.
- Amazing view of the Sagrada! Great location. Very easy to get anywhere you need to in Barcelona. Would stay again!

- Appartement spacieux, très propre et très confortable.Très bonne communication avec le propriétaire qui nous a généreusement permis de déposer nos bagages avant l'heure.Situation intéressante pour les visites, parking à 150 m, station de métro à 5 mn.
- Fantastic location and wonderful place to stay!!
- Great location. Apartment had everything we needed and the elevator was a great asset!

- We had a wonderful stay at the apartment. Plenty of room, very clean & in a great neighborhood. AC was excellent. Our welcome person was a little late and didn’t speak English at Check in but it wasn’t a big deal, we communicated with hand gestures and that worked just fine. I would absolutely recommend this apartment to anyone visiting Barcelona.
- Excelente emplacement.
- Nice apartment. Enjoyed our stay
- Great place to stay and to get to everywhere

- El apartamento esta muy bien ubicado tiene acceso cerca del metro y hay muchos sitios para conocer caminando. Las indicaciones que el host nos dio, fueron muy buenas incluyendo un mapa del sector. nuestra familia disfruto mucho la estadia.
- Excellent séjour à Barcelone. Logement propre, bien situé et conforme à l’annonce. Hôte réactif et sympathique. Merci pour l’accueil, nous recommandons vivement. ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
- Great location, walking distance from many sites and close to the metro.

- We absolutely loved this beautiful apartment! It's very stylish, modern and comfortable. The high ceilings and air conditioning were wonderful! The primary bedroom was very quiet and peaceful. Having a code to enter the building and a code to enter the apartment was so easy! I can't wait to recommend this property to anyone I know travelling to Barcelona. And I can't wait to return!

- Only stayed in Barcelona for 2 nights; short trip. Comfortably apartment, clean, spacious. The only small issue we had was that none of the balcony doors locked. This is a little worrisome when traveling to an unfamiliar area, and leaving valuables in the apartment. I let them know, and they said it would be resolved. very friendly, and helpful renter.
- O apartamento é grande, limpo e bonito e funcional. A pessoa que nos recepcionou foi super educada e solícita. Próximo a supermercado, e transporte público. Espero voltar.

- Un muy buen departamento: tiene una gran ubicación, en una calle muy tranquila, llegas caminado a muchos de los lugares de interés de Barcelona. El departamento está muy bien equipado. Los anfitriones son muy amables y muy claros en sus explicaciones.

- The apartment itself is comfortable and well-equipped, with thoughtful amenities like a real clothes dryer, elevator access, and reliable air conditioning—all big pluses. While some of the appliances and the shower are a bit dated, everything was functional and didn’t detract from our overall experience.
- Thank you Daniel for the assistance, highly recommended for the area and proximity to great places.
- 完美
- The apartment was in a great location in Gracia neighborhood. Beds were comfortable and the host was very responsive to our questions. We enjoyed our stay and thank you for hosting.

- Príjemný, čistý, priestorný byt. Vhodné aj pre rodinu. Plnohodnotných 5 postelí a nie rozkladacie gauče. Postele vŕzgali trošku. Štrvť v pohode. Lokalita super, blízko obchody, autobusová zastávka aj metro. Čiže presun po meste bol flexibilný. Vybavenie apartmánu veľmi dobré. Hostiteľ príjemný. Reagoval rýchlo. Boli sme spokojni.

- We were greeted and escorted to the property by the host. The description was accurate, quite location, many good restaurants in the area, lots of shopping options and the host provided helpful tips for Barcelona. I would stay at this property anytime.
- We had a great stay. Host was super helpful and responsive. We enjoyed our stay with our little girl.
- I had a wonderful stay Beautiful apartment, great atmosphere, and a very kind host. Highly recommended💞

- El apartamento se encuentra en un área en medio de todo, pero a la vez, en una calle calmada, donde ves locales y a pocas calles, toda la vida de la ciudad. El apartamento está equipado con todo en un espacio suficiente para la ciudad, incluyendo un ascensor o pocas escaleras, si es lo que quieres. Mi única observación es el sonido del sistema de aire central, ya que el la noche puede ser algo ruidoso, para personas sensibles a ruidos. Muchas gracias a los chicos encargados, muy atentos, amables y muy cerca su oficina de este apartamento. Hasta la próxima.

- We had a wonderful stay! The place was beautiful, very comfortable, and the location was absolutely perfect. Everything was nearby, and the atmosphere made the experience even better. We truly enjoyed our time here and would definitely recommend visiting this place.

- We enjoyed out stay at this apartment! It was perfect for two couples, since it had two bedrooms and two bathrooms. The living room was spacious, the dining area was good, and the kitchen had the necessary amenities (except for a coffee pot that didn't use pods). The Gracia neighborhood was great! Easy to walk to many nice, local restaurants (as in, not touristy). Midway between Parc Guell and the waterfront. Easy to get taxis on the main street. We were very happy and would return.
- Ottimo e pulito!! È come stare a casa!! Consigliatissimo

- Our stay was amazing!!! Daniel was fabulous - he went above and beyond to make our stay amazing. So kind and helpful! The apartment was spacious and perfect for our group. I would stay here again and recommend to anyone! The best area in Barcelona to stay!
- Prezzi a Barcellona sono fuori di testa. Ma o così o così
- Hermoso departamento, en un lugar privilegiado, con todo lo necesario para disfrutar de Barcelona. Daniel un gran anfitrión, que respondió a todas nuestras inquietudes. Volvería de seguro
- Alles super!
- Absolutely amazing views . A once in a lifetime stay don’t miss out.
- Peter è stato molto gentile e accogliente, l'appartamento è veramente stupendo e in una posizione logisticamente perfetta per visitare la città
- 就在gracia 大道旁边，吃喝出行都非常方便，早上还能吃到西班牙油条。屋里设备很全，自己买了蛏子回家煮，非常鲜美。特别是往南5分钟都是好吃的，闹中取静。
- The apartment was super conveniently located, a great size, and matches the description completely. Vincente was extremely friendly, helpful, and responsive. Highly recommend.

- Η διαμονή μας στο συγκεκριμένο Airbnb στη Βαρκελώνη ήταν πραγματικά εξαιρετική και ξεπέρασε τις προσδοκίες μας. Μείναμε ως οικογένεια και από την πρώτη στιγμή νιώσαμε άνετα, σαν στο σπίτι μας. Το διαμέρισμα ήταν πεντακάθαρο, πολύ προσεγμένο και ακριβώς όπως φαίνεται στις φωτογραφίες . Οι χώροι ήταν άνετοι, φωτεινοί και ιδανικοί για οικογένεια, με όλα όσα χρειάζεται κανείς για μια ευχάριστη και ξεκούραστη διαμονή. Η τοποθεσία ήταν εξαιρετική, με εύκολη πρόσβαση σε μέσα μεταφοράς, καταστήματα, εστιατόρια και σημεία ενδιαφέροντος, κάτι που έκανε τις μετακινήσεις μας πολύ εύκολες, ακόμη και με παιδί. Η γειτονιά ήταν ήσυχη και ασφαλής, ιδανική για οικογενειακές διακοπές. Ο οικοδεσπότης ήταν άψογος: ευγενικός, φιλικός και πάντα πρόθυμος να βοηθήσει, με άμεση επικοινωνία και χρήσιμες πληροφορίες για την πόλη. Μας έκανε να νιώσουμε πραγματικά καλοδεχούμενοι και φρόντισε ώστε η διαμονή μας να κυλήσει χωρίς το παραμικρό πρόβλημα. Συνολικά, πρόκειται για μια εξαιρετική επιλογή για όποιον ερθει
- Nice small quiet flat.
- Excellent apartment near Fira
- L’emplacement est magnifique et calme. On a vraiment passer un très bon séjour.
- We really enjoyed our stay in Barcelona. The accommodation was great for the price, the location is very convenient and close to the metro, and we felt safe during our stay. Thank you :)

- Первое что впечатляет ,это красивое здание ,в которых находятся апартаменты!Район очень удобный и комфортный для прогулок и покупок!Продуктовые магазины рядом, метро,автобусные остановки,различные магазины с одеждой,шоко магазин и Мак Дональдс !До Дома Милы 10мин пешком. Апартаменты просторные и комфортные ,две спальни с удобными кроватями ,две ванные комнаты !Отопление прекрасно работало ,проживали в феврале в прохладную и дождливую погоду! Одна спальня выходит на узкую улицу и было немного шумно ночью ,но вторая без окон и очень тихо ! Мы прекрасно отдыхали после экскурсий !Благодарим!

- El departamento sorprende al llegar. Increíble vista a la Sagrada Familia. Muy bien equipado. Dejaron pastillas para la lavadora de platos y ropa y otras cosas de cortesía que vinieron súper bien. Inmejorable ubicación para moverse por Barcelona. Lo volveríamos a elegir sin dudar. Saludos.

- Bel appartement, très bien situé vous pouvez visiter tout à pied, la seule chose c’est qu’il faut investir dans une television smart pour pouvoir regarder des films en streaming car la télé est très vieille et aussi rafraîchir un peu la salle de bain pour le reste c’est impeccable et je le recommande vivement.

- The flat is clean, spacious and in a great location! Parking is tough nearby if you drive and the dryer is very slow to dry and extra towels would be helpful. All in all, I highly recommended this spot having been to Barcelona several times, so many great spots a walk away. Try our favorite Tapas spot La Pepita!

- Appartement qui correspond bien à la description, agréable ,très propre et bien desservi par les transports en commun. Un tout petit bémol pour les équipements en cuisine un peu insuffisants .La cinquième chaise est absolument nécessaire pour 5 personnes Le quartier est assez tranquille . Un grand merci à nos hôtes pour leur patience , leur disponibilité et leur gentillesse : Alors que nous sommes arrivés un peu plus tard que prévu ,nous avons été très bien reçus ce qui a grandement facilité notre arrivée et notre séjour . Je saurai où loger lors de prochaines vacances ! Je recommande .

- Peter a été très accueillant, nous a fait une visite des lieux et nous a donné quelques informations très utiles par rapport aux transports et aux magasins de proximité. Les instructions pour le check out étaient très claires. l'appartement était très bien équipé. Merci pour ce séjour

- The accommodation looked nice and matched the photos. We felt safe in the area, and the metro station was relatively close. There were also shops nearby, which was convenient. However, the downside was that we could hear noisy neighbors at night, and there was not enough toilet paper provided during our stay. The agent who handled our check-in was very kind and helpful. When we got a little lost upon arrival, he assisted us and helped us find our way to the accommodation. ☺️
- This was a very nice apartment - clean, comfortable, and well-equipped. There were many good restaurants and shops in the neighborhood, and it was convenient to the Metro. Highly recommended!
- Très bel appartement très bien équipé avec une décoration sympathique Juste le grand lit un peu mou à nôtre goût

- We had a wonderful stay in Barcelona. The apartment is located on a quiet safe street only a short walking distance to sites, metro/buses, restaurants and shops. The hosts communicated very well and Check-in/out was very easy. Would stay again!
- Unbelievable place to stay for the week, everything at a stones throw. Best view of the Sagrada you could ever have.
- increíble estancia, sin duda regresaremos!
- 办公室就在楼下 小哥办理入住给予了非常详细的讲解
- Nos encantó el alojamiento. Todo estuvo muy bn . Seguro regresaremos. Lo recomendamos!! La atención de Daniel es muy amigable!

- Çok temiz düzenli ve merkezi bir yerdi. Bebek için mama sandalyesi ve bebek karyolası mevcuttu. Çok rahat ettik. Asansörlü diye tutmuştuk ama bebek arabası asansöre sığmadı. 1.katta olduğu için aşırı zorlanmadık ama ilan detaylarında asansörün küçük olduğu bilgisi paylaşılmalı. Onun dışında manzara harikaydı. Konum biraz gürültülü ama çok rahatsız etmedi. Ev sahibi check-in saatine biraz gecikti ama alt tarafındaki cafelerde bekledik sorun olmadı. Bu güzel konaklama için teşekkürler. Tekrar tercih edeceğiz.

- Wij hebben enorm genoten van ons verblijf met ons gezin van 4. Het appartement ligt in een fantastische buurt in Barcelona. Mooie winkels, lekkere restaurants, heerlijke vibe, maar toch rustig gelegen. Centraal om alles te bezichtigen. Veel gewandeld, maar metro netwerk is ook top. Propere kamers en badkamers. Keuken niet gebruikt, maar alles is voorhanden.

- Great place just outside Barcelon, but with easy access to the main points of the city via subway and train, yet with really calm neighborhood. Also, it is surprisingly close to Camp Nou. The host was really nice about our strange arrengement for check in. Great stay!

- The place was the perfect space to stay with my parents in their first stay in Barcelona. It was clean, big, comfortable, and in the middle of Gracia, but without being on a noisy street. My parents are very picky and they enjoyed everything in the apartment. The best part was Vicente who personally went out of his way to ensure our stay was perfect, he even recommended my dad a hat store. 10/10

- Clickandflat was very responsive throughout our stay. We had an issue with the shower head and lacking one dining chair, and it was fixed the very next day. The apartment is conveniently located close to the city center, with a nearby metro station that makes it easy to reach all the main attractions. There is also a parking space available; although it can be a bit tight to maneuver due to the narrow lane, it was still very helpful and saved us the hassle of finding parking elsewhere.

- We had a wonderful stay at this apatment. The location was excellent — very convenient and close to everything we needed. The room was clean, comfortable, and exactly as described. It had everything we needed for a pleasant stay. The only small downside was that there was a bit of noise since the apartment is on the ground floor. However, it wasn’t anything intense or particularly disturbing. Overall, we had a great experience and would definitely stay here again. Highly recommended!
- 有電梯有洗衣機。離地鐵站約350公尺左右，不遠，有咖啡機但膠囊要自己買，我們住4天就乾脆買一條10顆。 優點：交通方便，菜刀很好用（生父補充），辦公室可以寄物。 缺點：床包一開始給太小經反應才換合適的，周末扺達會多收20歐現金（時先溝通後我們沒收）。
- Excellent apartment in central Barcelona. Perfect transport links Very clean and comfortable, well equipped. Would highly recommend

- The apartment was nice, stylishly decorated, and located in a good neighborhood close to the metro. The host was very communicative and made sure we had everything we needed for a comfortable trip. ​The only downside was the €30 additional fee for checking in after 20:00, which is something to keep in mind if you have a late flight. Other than that, everything was perfect and I would highly recommend this place!

- We had an amazing stay! The apartment is in a great location—very convenient for getting around. A special shout-out to the balcony window: the view is fantastic and you can overlook the whole neighborhood, which we really loved. The host and the manager Leo were super welcoming and helpful. Leo recommended some great local food and coffee spots nearby in the living-room area, and after trying them, we can confirm they were truly delicious! The place was spotless, had no unpleasant smells, and everything we needed was provided. The best surprise was the air conditioning—Barcelona has a big temperature difference between day and night, so we had to use it at night, and it worked perfectly. I’ve already recommended this place to my friend who’s visiting in May. Highly recommended—give it a try, you won’t be disappointed!
- Good location nice view 😍
- Very nice accomodation in great location. A bit noisy, because it is on the ground floor, but that we expected.
- Stay, the flat and the hosts were great
- Vicinanza a metro e esercizi pubblici
- 溝通非常及時順暢，任何問題都可以及時獲得解決。房間跟照片一樣，非常整潔美麗，地點很方便。非常喜歡
- чисто и удобно, но твърде малки пространства в спалните и няма фурна
- 还是很不错的体验
- Loved our stay! Perfect location and very quiet considering how central it is. the receptions are lovely and gave us all recommendations on restaurants/supermarkets etc.. 100% recommend!

- Ich war sehr zufrieden. Die Wohnung liegt nahe der Messe Fira Barcelona (fußläufig), und für Innenstadtbesuche: Die nächste Metro-Station ist in 2 Minuten erreichbar. Restaurants, Bars und Einkaufsmöglichkeiten zu Fuß hervorragend erreichbar. Die große Mall ist ebenfalls um die Ecke. Nachts sehr ruhige Gegend. Betreuung und Kommunikation top. Kommen gerne wieder.
- Tout était parfait ! Nous étions 4 adultes et 2 enfants. Couchage ok dans le canapé pour 2 enfants. Appartement grand et propre , très bien placé.

- Nous avons passé un très bon séjour. Très bons restaurants à proximité du logement, bien desservi par les transports en commun. Hôte réactif et amical. Nous recommandons ce logement pour un séjour à Barcelone.

- Super cosy flat in a beautiful location. Excellent access to public transport and plenty of nearby restaurants. The hosts were very responsive, which was greatly appreciated. The only downside is that the street can get a bit noisy at night, especially on weekends, but otherwise everything was perfect.

- Tuvimos una estancia muy buena. El hospedaje está ubicado en una zona muy práctica, cerca de Gran Vía 2 y rodeado de servicios como supermercados y locales de comida. Moverse es sencillo: el metro (L1) queda cerca y permite hacer combinaciones fácilmente, y la llegada desde el aeropuerto por la L9S es directa y rápida. Agradecemos mucho la amabilidad del anfitrión y el detalle de entregarnos dos copias de llaves, lo cual nos dio mucha libertad como grupo. Como sugerencia, una llave digital facilitaría aún más el proceso de llegada. ¡Muy recomendado!

- We really enjoyed the place. It was a great choice. Loud neighbors - not our host to blame - next time we'd choose a top floor apartment to minimize the noise. It is a great place, close to bus stops, metro station and taxis.
- Perfect location, very nice apartment, highly recommended :)
- Such a great place to stay! Host were super responsive, kind and helpful. Perfect place to stay for a few days or an extended amount of time.
- Było czysto, zgodnie ze zdjęciami i w fajnej lokalizacji. Gospodarz był pod telefonem i bardzo miły. Polecam mocno!

- Неплохое жилье в Барселоне. Близко располагается тц и станции метро в 5-10 минутах ходьбы. Но я бы усовершенствовала косметический ремонт за данную цену, в особенности пол и двери. Хозяев очень приветливый, нас отлично встретили. Благодарим за прием
- Perfect!
- Great vacation, awesome place - love Spain & Sagrada Família
- Un lugar céntrico, seguro y bonito en Barcelona. Muy recomendable para todos los viajeros. Muchas gracias, esperamos verlos pronto.

- Very chilled area with lots of things to do. Most places were a 15–20 minute drive away, and the beach was only a 7-minute drive or a 15–20 minute walk. There’s a 24-hour shop just a 3-minute walk away, and another shop can even be seen from the balcony, close enough that you could ask your friends standing outside the shop to buy something for you. Behind the apartment, there is also a Lidl. Free parking is available, but you need to collect a card from the host. If you're not the best driver or struggle to manoeuvre, it might be a bit difficult because the route to the parking area is tight and the parking space itself is also quite small. Overall, we really enjoyed our stay.

- My stay at the Clickandflat S.L.U apartment on Carrer de Sardenya, 289 was absolutely unforgettable. The highlight, without a doubt, is the breathtaking proximity to the Sagrada Família. You can almost reach out and touch it. Waking up to a full, unobstructed view of this iconic masterpiece every day felt surreal, like living inside a postcard. The apartment itself was clean, comfortable, and thoughtfully arranged, making it easy to relax after a day exploring the city. The natural light pouring in through the windows, combined with that incredible view, created a truly special atmosphere that’s hard to match. The location is perfect, not only are you right next to one of Barcelona’s most famous landmarks, but you’re also within walking distance of great cafes, shops, and transport links. Everything you need is right at your doorstep. Overall, this apartment offers a unique and memorable experience. If you’re looking for a place where the view alone is worth the stay, this is it.
- Perfecto lugar , ubicación perfecta en la mejor zona de Barcelona , el apartamento muy limpio y bonito . Excelente opción
- Check in was a breeze with Daniel. Great location and very cute!
- We used the flat for a business trip and we were very satisfied with everything. Will use this flat again if it's available for our next trip.

- Muy limpio impresionante la vista a la iglesia Sagrada Familia, tiene todas las comodidades. Y algunas observaciones como el sofá cama en el salón se ve desgastado, daña la bonita decoración del lugar, sería bueno renovar esa parte, y lo otro al menos dejar un papel toalla en la cocina un básico por lo menos. Lo demás todo bien.

- for the rate and the space it was absolutely worth it! this was our last stop to our 2 week trip and it gave us so much room to spread out after being cramped up the following days! easy to get in and out! felt very safe in the neighborhood. overall amazing would 100% stay again!!

- This was a wonderful Airbnb for our family! It was central in the city and had easy access to bus and train/subway stations. Very clean and in a safe area. Very easy check in and out. Highly recommend this apartment for anyone visiting Barcelona!
- Thanks for the lovely stay. Loved the appartement, ammeneties and surroundings. The terrace was amazing!
- Amazing apartment with the best location. Really enjoyed the rooftop and overall had an amazing experience!
- One of the best airbnbs I’ve stayed in, super helpful staff that work in the office below and even let us check in earlier and check out later! Very cool area, highly recommend
- Idéalement situé, propre et fonctionnel.

- we loved this apartment and the neighborhood so much! Daniel and Vicente were both super helpful and they gave us some great recommendations for restaurants in the area. The apartment itself is so bright and sunny and comfortable, and the location is amazing! We loved getting to know the gracia neighborhood, and we could walk to lots of destinations from the apartment and also were very close to the metro when we wanted to use it. This was our first time in Barcelona and this was a great home base for exploring and also for just getting to pretend we were locals for a week. The terrace was beautiful and such a great place to spend time. There was construction in the building next door that was pretty loud at times during the day but it's a city and to be expected sometime, but I think it would have been even more lovely without the construction. I can't wait to come back to barcelona and would book this apartment again without hesitation!
- Beautiful apartment well located and looks exactly as described
- Super appartement, lieu idéal pour visiter Barcelone , proche métro , bus et restaurants On y retournera
- According to what’s offered in the description, no bad surprises. Great for a family of 5 or 6.
- Apartamentul a fost perfect pentru sejurul nostru de 3 nopti si pentru grupul nostru de 6 persoane. Gazda a fost foarte comunicativă si ne-am simtit foarte bine! Terasa superba!

- the place was nice. location is close to everything like any public transpo. theres a nearby mall. very closed to grocery store and have a lot of resto around. neighbors was respectful about quite hours atleast. one thing to recommend is to change the noisy bed. it doesnt gave a good sleep at all. its so noisy everytime u move. but overall stay was fine.

- Apartamento, aunque pequeño, muy bien equipado con todo lo necesario y cómodo; mobiliario bastante nuevo. Ubicado en las afueras de la ciudad pero cerca de todo (metro, supermercado, restaurantes, centro comercial).

- Really liked this place, they were very accommodating and kept in touch at every step to make it very easy to stay. Nice apartment, Lots of beds, nice cold AC and it's a great location for easy metro into the centre too.
- Satisfeita com o apartamento , único motivo a reclamar é a falta de lugar pra estacionar …
- Apartamento bem equipado e com boa localização.
- Departamento muy cómodo, impecable. Acceso a medios de transporte fácil. Rodeado de supermercados y restaurantes.
- とても綺麗なお部屋でした。 立地も良く、どこに出向くにも便利でした。
- 발코니에서 바라본 사그라다 파밀리아는 환상적이었습니다. 숙소에 적당한 채광이 잘 들어와서 쾌적하게 지낼 수 있었습니다. 내부 청결도 좋았고 특히 화장실 샤워기의 수압이 세서 좋았습니다. 호스트가 친절하게 주변 레스토랑 등을 안내해주셔서 더욱 좋은 시간을 보낼 수 있었습니다☺️
- Great accommodation with amazing view of Sagrada Família. We had a great time and we would love to come back again.
- Great place to stay. Very clean. Host was very friendly and communicated. Good restaurants around
- Great location and clean apartment

- Wir haben den Aufenthalt in dieser Unterkunft sehr geschätzt. Die Unterkunft hat eine gute Lage, von der aus man viele Sehenswürdigkeiten zu Fuß oder auch einfach mit den öffentlichen Verkehrsmitteln erreichen kann. Die unmittelbare Umgebung ist ruhig. - This apartment was a true home away from home experience for our family! The space was a perfect size for two adults and two young kids. The apartment also had great sunlight and we really appreciated the black out shades and living room walls sconce that served as a nightlight for evening bathroom visits. The building itself was beautiful and the elevator was so helpful for our youngest and the stroller we needed each day. We felt so comfortable and safe! Borgo magico e struttura favolosa. - Una delle strutture più meritevoli che mi viene in mente paragonando tutti i viaggi fatti sia in Italia che all’estero. Non manca assolutamente niente ed è dotata di tutti i confort per poter passare una vacanza tra amici, fidanzati o in famiglia con bambini anche piccoli. Un saluto speciale va alla signora Benedetta e alla cura che lei dimostra verso i suoi Host. Non si è limitata a fornire i soliti dettagli per il check in ma ha dato anche indicazioni dettagliate su come scegliere il percorso migliore per arrivare alla struttura più facilmente possibile. Se scegliete di prenotare questa struttura non ve ne pentirete assolutamente. Assolutamente nulla.

- This stay was extremely disappointing. The hosts decided to carry out construction work in the apartment across the hall (which they also own) during our stay. Because the sound insulation is absolutely terrible, the noise was constant and unbearable. What’s worse is that when we raised the issue, nothing was done. No solution, no compensation, not even a basic effort to address the situation. Even though the apartment is well located, the bed is not comfortable for two people, and the furniture is very old and not particularly clean. - The building is well situated and has the old charming architecture. With that comes original thin windows so outside noise comes in. Inside, the rooms are separated by smoked glass windows which do not afford enough privacy, and let light in. And the curtains were not black out either. The place is ok space wise but pretty cheap furniture with the decorative clock handles broken. Very clean though. Lastly, the pillows are flat and cheap. I think for value you can do better. - The good: 1. Location. Walkable distance to most of the attractions. Public transportation is near by as well. 2. Host support. The host was responsive with emails and provided a number for urgency, which is actually attended by a human. 3. Provided all the expected amenities. The bad/not so good: 1. On the first floor right next to the building's gate. A little noisy. 2. Biggest problem is that there is a constant moldy/misty smell throughout the apartment. Even the beddings have the some kind of stale smell and I couldn't sleep well the first night due to that it. Maybe it is just me but I can't sleep if I feel the bedding gives me a "not clean" feel due to the smell. It may not be a problem for others since the smell is kind of subtle (but it is definitely there). I was able to find another comfortable in the closet, which is a little better. Do not expect that you can mitigate the problem with adequate ventilation because you can't. The apartment has only one small openable window and opens right to the street. The pedestrians literally walk by you. I have a theory of why the whole apartment and the bedding smell so moldy/not fresh but that goes beyond the purpose of this review. 3. The beddings and the mattresses are of mediocre quality. My wife said she can feel the springs in the mattress. In summary, if you are a person who is not bothered by subtle but constant unpleasant smells, this might be a bargain.

The flat is ok as a base. I think overpriced for the standard. It was at best pleasent enough. - The location of the property was great. Quiet enough area with metro a 4/5 mins walk away. Supermarket also 2/3 min walk. There is Netflix and Disney so when you get home after a long day you can chill out with the kids. The shower is powerful and helps wash away a full day nicely. Kitchen small but has most of what you need. Air conditioning is good. Large bedroom with lots of wardrobe space was a pluss. The property served its purpose and if you are out most of the day it’s ok. But the flat we stayed in had no light apart from one bedroom which I found gave a depressing vibe if you was in it for too long. Some of the blinds didn’t work anyway. Most importantly the place wasn’t clean enough. The rugs were very dirty and off putting. There was dust all along the skirtings and the balcony feature has not seen a broom for a while which was disappointing. And the flat smelt allot like damp when we arrived.

Appartamento grazioso in posizione fantastica. Peccato per i costi nascosti! - Non era prevista colazione. La posizione era fantastica Non mi è piaciuto scoprire che avrei dovuto pagare un supplemento per ricevere le chiavi la sera. In particolare, siccome il mio aereo è atterrato con oltre un'ora di ritardo, ho dovuto pagare un supplemento di 50 euro per ricevere le chiavi. Includendo la tassa di soggiorno, ho pagato complessivamente 354 euro. Per quella somma avrei sicuramente trovato un buon albergo o un appartamento migliore. Mi sarebbe piaciuto conoscere tutti i costi prima di prenotare la struttura con pagamento anticipato non rimborsabile

I would not recommend a stay in the ground floor units. The lovely pictures in the listing are obviously upper floors an - The location was excellent. Reasonably close (a number of blocks) to a couple metro stations and within a block of a busy area with lots of dining and shopping options. The unit seemed clean except for living room rug. Staff were courteous. Unit fairly well equipped and a broken corkscrew was replaced immediately. Internet worked fine. Some starter kitchen items were available, pods for coffee, s&p, olive oil, balsamic, tea, etc. Clean hard surface floors We were in ground floor red unit, identified as city view. There is NO view. The windows are frosted 2/3’s of the way up and the unfrosted third looks directly at another tall building. Even if you try, you cannot see sky. The apartment is dark. Windows don’t open, which is stated in listing. When checking in, I asked for linens for the sofa bed and was told to take them off the second twin bed, which was made up. The sofa bed is a queen, not a twin. I slept for 4 nights without proper bedding on the sofa bed. If you are two friends traveling together, just assume that they assume you will sleep an inch from each other in the same room, which we did not want to do. Also, sofa bed is not comfortable so I slept crosswise across the top. To be fair, they DID bring a bigger duvet on Monday (my third night) but still no sheet, so I made the duvet cover into a flat sheet. The fitted sheet that management said was on the bed was either for a full size or so badly shrunken that the fourth corner would not stay on without bending up the mattress. Not all the amenities in the Booking listing are present. No bidet, no clothes drying rack, TV is present in living room, but has been taken off the wall in the bedroom (in case that is a dealbreaker for you), rooftop terrace mentioned in listing is only for one particular apartment, etc.

Great value, good location - Really easy check in, friendly staff, good communication 👏 There is noise from outside, but thats too be expected in the centre of the city.

Je recommande ce logements pour un séjour à Barcelone. - Le logement est très propre, facile d’accès en métro ou en bus et le personnel est très agréable et réactifs à nos demandes. Le logement est annoncé comme adapté aux personnes à mobilités réduites mais il y a 3 marches à l’entrée du bâtiments et toute les pièces ne sont pas accessibles car les portes sont trop étroites.

- Недалеко метро , меркадона, в воскресенье работают маленькие магазины прям возле отеля , автобусная остановка в 500-600 метрах, компактно но 3 комнаты спальни ,гостиная - столовая и все есть необходимое ( микроволновка, чайник , кофемашинка … Берут депозит в 300 евро с карты , читайте внимательно ( такое редко ) но вернули через неделю после выселения , есть доплата за заселение после 20 часов + доплата 20 евро ,что вы приехали в субботу или воскресенье , на что я не обратила сразу внимание ))) нет балкона , окна выходят во внутрь двора или дома , жестковатые подушки

Very pleasant stay in Barcelona - The property is very well located, close to two metro lines (one is a 5-minute walk, the other an 8-minute walk). One of these lines runs directly from the airport, making it very easy access by metro from the airport to accommodation. A shop open late is very close by, and there are pleasant local tapas bars nearby. The apartment is clean, well-equipped, with comfortable beds. Friendly and prompt service by owner for any additional questions during your stay via Booking.com The security deposit was high at €300, returned quite long time (after 12 days). A rusty dishwasher basket needs replacing, which was reported to the property owner. The toilet paper provided was insufficient for the number of people and the length of stay; it wasn't enough for the entire stay.
- El apto se ajusta a lo que describe

- This is a nice quiet apartment in a great location with easy access to many locations. It is on the 3rd floor walk (4th level) up with no elevator. The apartment is nice and clean, but lack some amenities that would make it more like home. Is clearly a buisness, but one that prioritizes a commendable level of service. Great place.

- Great location and very convenient for visiting Barcelona. The Sagrada Família is within walking distance, and there is a taxi stand right outside the building. There is some room for improvement regarding the amenities. The shower head could not be secured in place, making it a bit difficult to use. We also noticed a few small bugs in the room, and the sofa was not very comfortable as it sometimes caused itchiness. Overall, a convenient place to stay, especially for those looking to explore the area around Sagrada Família.

- Incredible views. Great location. Rooms were smaller than expected, and couch and rug were stained. There were some minor maintenance issues (slow bathroom sink, broken table). Overall, it was great customer service and we are extremely pleased. I would recommend anyone looking to stay at a beautiful apartment, this is a good choice.
- Perfect appartement, van alle gemakken voorzien. Mooie locatie, soms wat lawaaiig in de nacht.
- Apartamentul este foarte aproape de La Rambla si la 3 minute de gura de metrou. Este un apartament mare, potrivit pt 6 persoane cu tot ce ai nevoie pt câteva zile.
- Nous avons passé un bon séjour dans ce logement conforme a la description et propre . Emplacement idéal . Je mettrai un seul bémol l’insonorisation de l’appartement est très mauvaise.

- Très bon accueil de l'agence chargée de l'immeuble. J'ai pu laisser ma valise en attendant le check-in et ils ont proposé de garder ma valise après le checkout. Le bâtiment et l'appartement sont propres et bien entretenus. Peut-être il manquait un peu plus de réserve de papier et une bouilloire. C'est un quartier calme et sûr mais à quelques minutes à pieds de Gracia (restaurants, bar, commerces...) et proche des métros pour aller en 5-10 minutes au centre ville. C'est très calme avec une belle et grande terrasse privée. Si je devais donner un point négatif mais je suis venu en hiver: la terrasse n'a pas de soleil direct, donc toujours dans l'ombre. Aussi le chauffage central était difficile à régler (soit trop chaud, soit trop froid). Mais ce sont des détails. Le reste est parfait. Merci pour le séjour. Je reviendrai !!!

- Las fotos acorde a la estadía, el departamento tenía todo lo necesario para una corta estadía en Barcelona. Aunque no queda muy central, hay estación de metro en pocas cuadras. Solo un día hubo un problema en el barrio por la noche, pero nada que afectara nuestra estadía y que sea un problema directamente del anfitrión. Realmente no tengo ninguna queja :)
- It was good.

- The hosts were super responsive. They recommended excellent restaurants and an ice cream place! Apartment is in an excellent location 10mins from goudi apartments, close to metro stations. Apartment had everything we needed. Thank you
- Convenient location and easy to get around the city from there. The staff were friendly and welcoming throughout the stay.

- Host was very responsive to meeting us at scheduled time, helping with bags, showing us around apartment. Daniel was very friendly and helpful. Two problems: Refrigerator was not very cold to keep food like meats & dairy fresh, and black mold in shower, which had obviously gone some time. They defrosted the frig which helped a bit (still should be replaced), and they tried to clean black mold with limited success. They were very responsive which was appreciated, but I feel like attention to cleaning detail was lacking. Walls need a repaint, and the place in general needs a good top to bottom going over. The location was great to explore old town, Sagrada Família & the main shopping areas in town. A grocery right around corner was cheap & convenient! WiFi was strong, smart tv was great (could mirror with iPhone), shower water pressure was meh, shower head also had mold on it :( . W&D worked well, provided soap, good pots & pans, shampoo, beds comfy. Kitchen well stocked.

- Great location for short city break. Close to L1 metro line and big shopping centre as well local markets and local shops, takeaways etc. Flat was clean but very basic with a bit outdated style. As this is more of the hotel like chain, lacked personal touches, leaflets about surrounding, attractions and transportation tips to get around the Barcelona. Unfortunately taxi company recommend by the click&flat didn’t arrive to pick us up on the way to airport, despite booking scheduled evening before, so just a hint, uber arrived in minutes and was €6 cheaper. Overall good, clean place to stay!
- Güzel zaman geçirdik. Oda beklediğimiz biraz küçüktü ancak konumu ve çalışanlar çok iyiydi.
- Very friendly hosts. Great location: close to metro, shops and restos. Lively area so quite noisy at night but ok for a short stay.
- Werde die Unterkunft wieder buchen.
- Charming and clean apt. If you are a light sleeper consider the living room full sized and super comfy sofa bed.

- Le logement est très bien situé, avec une belle vue sur la Sagrada Familia. Il est spacieux et agréable. Les propriétaires sont sympathiques mais mettent parfois un peu de temps pour répondre aux questions. L'équipement (vaisselle, torchons, ...) est bien mais en quantité faible voire pour certains inexistants.

- Good location, the apartment matches the description. During the stay, I encountered an issue with the hot water in the shower on the bathroom near the big bedroom. The host say they fixed it after I left, so I simply suggest to check the hot water in the shower when you are checking in.

- El departamento es grande y lindo, remodelado, aunque la publicación da la sensación de ser un inmueble de categoría y no lo es. De todos está bien presentado y es amplio. La atención fue muy buena y la ubicación también; algo ruidoso tal vez por la mañana temprano.

- The area was fantastic, easy access, beautiful square right outside where you can sit and have a coffee. Grabbed gelato and coffee every day which was a minute outside the apartment. Gaudi architecture within 5/10 min walk. Numerous places to eat and we also used Uber Eats. Here are a few great spots ( Acero Burgers, Mixto, Natura Pizza, Z&O Lebanese, Creamy Homemade Pasta) The bathroom needs renovating and the property mgr was open about it when I brought it up. If you arent used to the street cleaning and trash collecting in Barcelona they do it post 11pm every night and its loud but we aren't light sleepers so it didnt bother us. The couch wasnt comfortable but the beds were good. opening the doors to the balconies was wonderful.

- Todo perfecto. El apartamento estaba impecable, bien equipado y muy bien ubicado, ideal para la Maratón de Barcelona. La comunicación con el anfitrión fue excelente y todo resultó muy cómodo antes y después de la carrera. Sin duda, una opción muy recomendable para repetir.
- Confortable, sin más

- Sadece giriş esnasında bizden önceki misafirin eşyalarını zamanında almaması sebebiyle 1 saat kadar geç giriş yapabildik, yetkili kişi bu konuyu çözmek adına ciddi çaba gösterdi. Teşekkür ederiz. Lokasyon gayet güzel (hava alanı ulaşımı için otobüslerin kalktığı Katalonya meydanına 2 dk yürüme mesafesinde)

- Logement correct et fonctionnel mais bruyant, aucune isolation phonique. Mauvaises odeurs dans la salle de bain. Léger en ustensiles de cuisine pour 5 personnes et mobilier insuffisant (4 chaises à la table à manger) . Bon séjour quand même.

- Nice apartment on high floor, easy to arrange a meeting to get keys. Great view of city, nice balcony. Apartment was a little older & could have had more/ better linens. Nice it had a washing machine. Loved exploring Barcelona! Thx

Si può fare di più - Struttura molto pulita . Non mancava nulla. Abbiamo atteso 45 per avere la chiave della stanza nonostante avessimo comunicato il nostro avviso. Poca attenzione ai particolari , ruggine nel forno a micro onde e sulla parte laterale della lavatrice, tenda doccia rotta e seconda camera da letto molto piccola ( quasi un corridoio) con i 2 letti accostati ad elle. C’ è di meglio per quel prezzo

- Locatie was prima. Op 15 minuten loopafstand van het congresgebouw. Winkels om de hoek. Daarnaast op loopafstand metros om met gemak naar alle bezienswaadigheden te gaan. We hadden hinder van duiven die waarschijnlijk een nest hadden gemaakt boven het plafond van de badkamer.

Overall a good stay. - Great location with restaurants and supermarket nearby. There were two “bath”rooms in the apartment BUT only one of them has a shower. The four of us had to share one shower. Disappointed.

Appartement bien placé et confortable - L’appartement est bien placé pour visiter Barcelone, pas très loin du métro. Il est spacieux et confortable, bien équipé. Les lits sont confortables. Il y a un ascenseur et la climatisation. Il est bien décoré et fonctionnel. Draps et serviettes sont fournis, ainsi que gel douche et shampoing, et le nécessaire pour la vaisselle. Nous n’avons pas réussi à utiliser la douche correctement, nous n’avons pas toujours eu de l’eau chaude à cause du chauffe-eau instantané qui doit être mal réglé, c'était pénible. Nous aurions apprécié quelques produits de base comme sel, poivre, sucre, huile.
- Lokal czysty, obsługa przemiła. Wszystko ok Pokój z łóżkiem jednoosobowym z oknem na klatkę. Duży hałas z innych mieszkań w nim słychać

Muito boa - Apartamento muito bem equipado . Ótima localização… anfitrião muito simpático . A casa e os móvel estavam impecáveis … Achei que faltou coisas muito simples diferente de outros lugares que EU já fui como gel de duche e foram poucas toalhas … de resto fui tudo muito bom . Como disse anteriormente o especo é muito bom bem equipado e a localização é excelente… também por ser um espaço de lixo faltou uma boa tv …
- Appartement confortable Quartier vivant avec commerces et transports à proximité Mauvaise Insonorisation (particulièrement la 2ème chambre)
Ci siamo trovati bene - appartamento carino, tenuto bene bagno un po’ piccolo
- Estaba limpio y comodo No hay persianas
- Personal service great communication
- Great location 主臥浴室熱水不熱

- Location is very close to most important objectives, this is great. The apartment is very well equipped with everything you may need during a short stay. The smart TV from the living room is a great plus! The agency staff was really helpful and kind, they gave us plenty of tips on how we can make our staying more enjoyable. Well, in the first night we had a lot of noise from the other apartments, I only felt asleep at 2 AM. The beds are not most comfortable, at least as per my expectations. Last but not least, I did not like the fact that I had to block my 300 Euro deposit for almost 2 weeks, as this is not a very common practice, at least this is the first time I have to pay for this for a property booked from Booking.
- L environnement et la disposition du logement Il manquait Un jeu de prises multiples dans la cuisine
- Great communication, the place was clean and comfortable there was no place to put the hand-washed dishes to dry (we didn't want to turn on the dishwasher all the time)
- Apartament duzy I przestronny . Bardzo czysty Pierwszego dnia zatkała nam sie toaleta ale wmiare szybko naprawili .
- Location, number of the rooms,facilities Room size,noise

Buena estancia - Apartamento muy amplio y bien ubicado. Hay de todo en el barrio y si quieres hacer turismo es un buen sitio para alojarse. Que no tuviera persianas. Que pidan 300€ de fianza que pagas nada más coger el apartamentos pero que tarden bastante en devolverlo.

Przestronne mieszkanie, dobrze skomunikowane - Mieszkanie w pełni wyposażone, kuchnia miała wszystko czego potrzeba do gotowania, wiec można było przyrządzać posiłki. Mieszkanie wyglądało jak na zdjęciach, przestronne pokoje. Taras wychodził na ulicę, ale co zaskakujące ulica naprawdę cicha, wiec spędzanie na nim czasu było przyjemne. do pralki dostaliśmy dwie kapsułki do prania wiec miło. blisko sklepy oraz lokalny ryneczek. Pod kątem komunikacyjnym super, blisko i przystanek metra i autobusu. Depozyt został szybko oddany, wiec też na plus że niebyło to sztucznie przeciągane. Otrzymaliśmy worki na śmieci / papier toaletowy / kosmetyki - ale polecam mieć swoje, gdyż ilość i jakość otrzymanych nie były wystarczające. Pojawiały się małe mróweczki, w ilości nie inwazyjnej, ale się pojawiały, takie malutkie jak główka od szpilki. Podczas naszego pobytu wystąpiła awaria windy, na drugi dzień winda została naprawiona, dla nas nie był to kłopot, ale zwracam uwagę dla osób z utrudnioną mobilnością iż schody są dość wąskie, a piętra wysokie.
Short stay near FIRA - Good location - close to metro and to Fira convention center Bed sheets and linen were so-so, not very comfortable. Relatively small bathroom
À refaire - L’emplacement est canon, près de des ramblas, du port et de Montjuic Appart très propre, bien équipé et le parking est un vrai plus Le bruit toute la nuit ..

Without strictness everything would have been perfect ! - The price is ok, the rooms are big except for the bathroom, the kitchen is equipped, big terrace, internet is good. The strictness ! Since we have arrived, we where with a 3 years old child coming from a 14 hours of travel, the person keep us outside until the clock was exactly 4:00 PM not one 1 minute early. The person join us at the entrance and pass by in the apartment and waited there alone until 4:00 PM (very strange). Immediately after entering in the apartment he said: You have to give 300 euro in case something is broken during our stay. He blocked 300 euro from my card and releases the amount after 2 weeks after leaving the apartment (he checked the apartment immediately after our leave so he could give the money back after 2 - 3 days.) After getting the money he started: before you leave you have to get the trash out (otherwise he has to pay someone to bring the trash out), we have to clean the kitchen no dishes in the sink (otherwise he has to pay someone to do the dishes). In the leaving day before 5 minute of the expiry time someone knock at our door (it was one man with the cleaning) and he said that at 11:00 we have to leave. I didn't understand why this strictness !
- Spacieux, calme, propre, literie confortable et très bien situé à proximité des stations de métro.

Dobry apartament w dobrej lokalizacji i korzystnej cenie - Aprarament czysty, łóżka wygodne. Blisko do stacii metra oraz do Fira. W okolicy duży market, knajpy, piekarnie. Bardzo dobry kontakt od samej rezerwacji. Trochę mała łazienka - ale czysta i wyposażona. Dopłata za późny checkin (zostaliśmy wcześniej poinformowani).

Schöner Aufenthalt - Die Mitarbeiter waren super freundlich und hilfsbereit und haben gute, nützliche Tipps gegeben. Wir haben uns sicher und wohl gefühlt. Das Appartement war gut ausgestattet, alles vorhanden wie beschrieben und genug Platz. Die Lage war perfekt: alles was man braucht in der Nähe, kurzer Weg zur Metro. Die Betten/Matratzen sind nicht sehr bequem. Leider gab es im selben Haus Gäste/Bewohner die auch nachts die Tür lautstark ins Schloss fallen ließen und auch um 2 Uhr nachts rumgeschrien haben. Dafür kann aber die Unterkunft selbst nichts.
Erg goed, wij hebben genoten van ons verblijf. - De bereikbaarheid van de openbaar vervoer. Eigenlijk niets.

- Staff met at the entrance to let me in and was very friendly and helpful. Was working at the Fira, location was superb, 10 min walk. Beds comfy, apartment has everything you need. There is a heater/aircon unit in the lounge area. There is a good well stocked supermarket 30 seconds up the road. The walls are paper thin and you do hear a lot of noise, apartment next door I thought were murdering eachother at one point. There is no heater/aircon in bedrooms, i visited in Jan and the bedrooms were very cold.
- Beautifully decorated place A bit too noisy at night

- Logement bien placé. Des réceptionnistes à proximité pour nous accompagner Troisième étage sans ascenseur, pas très pratique avec une poussette Salle de bain très petite mais fonctionnelle. On peut y être à une seule personne Les matelas des 2 lits grincaient beaucoup

- Hébergement très bien équipé, propre, très proche des commerces, boulangerie, très proche du métro et des lignes de bus, calme. Bon contact avec le personnel réactif aux messages. La connexion wifi n était pas stable
Rodzina - Lokalizacja, blisko komunikacji i lokalnych sklepów, apartament dobrze wyposażony. Widok z okien.

Polecam-jeśli będę planować kolejną wizytę to na pewno rozważę również inne lokalizacje lokalizacje - Szybki i bezproblemowy kontakt. Możliwość bezpłatnego wydłużenia meldunku ze względu na przylot samolotu. Komunikatywność i otwartość. Apartament w niedalekiej odległości od stacji metra i pociągu oraz sklepów. Niestabilne łóżka oraz słabo wygłuszony apartament. Dodatkowym niewielkim minusem było tylko 100 ml szamponu i 100 ml żelu pod prysznic dla 4 osób na 4 noce. Oczywiście można dokupić w sklepie , ale byłyśmy przekonane że mamy w apartamencie.
Overall a good stay. The place is well-equipped and clean and I appreciated that soap, laundry detergent and some basics - Location No actual front desk/reception

lastPos.txt: - Excellent séjour à Barcelone. Logement propre, bien situé et conforme à l’annonce. Hôte réactif et sympathique. Merci pour l’accueil, nous recommandons vivement. ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

lastNeg.txt: La casa era sporca abbiamo inizialmente mente chiesto in modo gentile di pulire la casa, la risposta è stata afirmativa - Niente la casa era sporca abbiamo inizialmente mente chiesto in modo gentile di pulire la casa, la risposta è stata afirmativa che qualcuno passava a pulire, non è passato nessuno, alla seconda richiesta di pulizia la risposta è stata la casa per noi è pulita Non mi è piaciuto niente
